text:
The espresso machine hissing.

Roger stirs coffee absentmindedly.

On the radio, talk radio turning irritation into anger.

Rumors spread like sparks in dry grass.

That was when I realized most people defend habits more than truth.

disturbance.text: Talk radio turning irritation into anger
